pi_items.source: OpenProject setup script (scripts/setup_openproject.sh) creates a project with this identifier.
Explicitly defined in the task description ('update its Project Status to 'At risk'').
Keywords are directly derived from the required explanation text given in the task description.
The exact explanation string required by the task description is 124 characters long, which is greater than the specified minimum of 50.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates in a fully synthetic OpenProject environment. The project 'Mobile Banking App' has the identifier 'mobile-banking-app'. The target project status to set is 'At risk' with an explanation containing specific keywords ('security', 'vulnerability', 'biometric', 'CVE-2024-9999'). The required explanation string is 124 characters long, which meets the 50-character minimum threshold.
